visuals.title: Encoder-Decoder Architecture Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
        <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
      </path>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Machine Translation Fundamentals</text>
  
  <!-- Source Language -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Source Language
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Translation Engine -->
  <rect x="190" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Translation Engine
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Target Language -->
  <rect x="250" y="70" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Target Language
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Source to Engine -->
  <path d="M110 110 L190 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Engine to Target -->
  <path d="M250 170 L310 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Input Text -->
  <text x="110" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" font-style="italic" opacity="0">
    "Hello world"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Output Text -->
  <text x="310" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" font-style="italic" opacity="0">
    "Hola mundo"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
